query:
SELECT 
  id,
  clientId,
  sessionType,
  sessionDate,
  startTime,
  endTime,
  cancelled,
  lastReminderSentAt,
  DATE(lastReminderSentAt) as reminder_date,
  TIME(lastReminderSentAt) as reminder_time,
  createdAt
FROM training_sessions
WHERE clientId = 2070001
  AND sessionDate >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY sessionDate ASC, startTime ASC;
